type.description: Application type (lookup filter; also used when creating from a source where it defaults to MICROSERVICE)

subscribed.description: Desired subscription state (defaults to true when omitted); false unsubscribes the application from the target tenant

contextPath.description: Context path used when creating the application (defaults to the name)

source.description: Where the application binary (zip) comes from; must resolve to a single file

name.description: Name of the command group (used in the output)

actions.description: Shell commands executed in sequence via 'sh -c' from the manifest directory; a failing action skips the rest of the group

name.description: Name of the configuration item (defaults to the filename without extension)

deviceType.description: Restrict the configuration to a device type

source.description: Where the configuration file comes from

deviceType.description: Restrict the profile to a device type (c8y_Filter.type)

firmware.description: Firmware version included in the profile

software.description: Software versions included in the profile

configuration.description: Configuration items included in the profile

enabled.description: Desired feature state (defaults to true when omitted)

name.description: Override the parsed firmware name (all files become versions of this single firmware item)

deviceType.description: Restrict the firmware to a device type (c8y_Filter.type); supports {name} {version} and {filename} placeholders derived from the artifact filename

version.description: Override the version for all files (defaults to the version parsed from the filename and then the GitHub release tag)

versionPattern.description: Regular expression with a single capture group to extract the version from the filename for custom naming schemes

source.description: Where the firmware images come from

release.description: Which release(s) to use: latest (default) or latest-N for the latest N releases or all or a specific tag

assets.description: Glob patterns matched against release asset filenames (default: *)

includePrereleases.description: Include prereleases when release is latest or all

linkOnly.description: Reference the asset download URL instead of uploading the binary (public repositories only)

token.description: GitHub API token (falls back to GITHUB_TOKEN / GH_TOKEN env vars; supports ${VAR} expansion)

run.description: Command executed with 'sh -c' from the manifest directory

pre.description: Commands executed before the sync; a failing pre hook aborts the run

post.description: Commands executed after the sync (also when sections failed); failures are reported but do not abort

sections.description: Hooks executed around individual sections (keyed by section name e.g. software); skipped when the section is excluded by --only

name.description: Configuration item name (must exist in the tenant)

type.description: Configuration type of the referenced item

name.description: Firmware name (must exist in the tenant)

version.description: Firmware version (must exist in the tenant)

name.description: Software name (must exist in the tenant)

version.description: Software version (must exist in the tenant)

pre.description: Commands executed before the section; a failing pre hook aborts the run

post.description: Commands executed after the section (also when items failed); failures are reported but do not abort

namePrefix.description: Prefix added to every parsed software name

type.description: Force the softwareType for all packages from this source (overrides auto-detection)

typeMap.description: Map filename glob patterns to software types (pattern=softwaretype; first match wins)

version.description: Override the parsed version (useful for single-file sources)

source.description: Where the software packages come from

path.description: Local file or directory (relative paths are resolved against the manifest directory)

patterns.description: Glob patterns matched against filenames when path is a directory (default: *)

url.description: External URL referenced without uploading a binary

github.description: Pull release assets from a GitHub repository

optional.description: Skip this entry instead of failing when the path does not exist or nothing matches

mode.description: Credential source for other tenants (defaults to serviceUser)

application.description: Name of the placeholder microservice used in serviceUser mode (created if missing; defaults to tenant-sync)

sessionHome.description: Directory containing go-c8y-cli session files for the sessions mode (defaults to $C8Y_SESSION_HOME and then ~/.cumulocity)

current.description: Include the current tenant (defaults to true only when no other selection mode is set)

allChildren.description: Apply to all child tenants of the current tenant (requires parent/management tenant credentials)

tenants.description: Tenants referenced by ID or by domain (entries containing a dot are treated as domains)

selector.description: Select tenants matching criteria (domain glob and/or company name)

credentials.description: How credentials for the other tenants are obtained (defaults to the serviceUser mode)

value.description: Desired value of the tenant option (mutually exclusive with valueFrom)

valueFrom.description: Resolve the value by a named lookup at apply time (mutually exclusive with value)

application.description: Application name resolved to its application ID

device.description: Device name resolved to its managed object ID

domain.description: Glob pattern matched against the tenant domain

company.description: Exact company name of the tenant

targets.description: Which tenants the manifest is applied to (defaults to the current tenant); applying to other tenants requires parent/management tenant credentials

tenantOptions.description: Tenant options to set (created if missing and updated when the value differs)

features.description: Feature toggles to enable or disable for the current tenant

applications.description: Applications to subscribe to the current tenant (optionally created/uploaded from a source)

software.description: Software packages to sync into the software repository

firmware.description: Firmware (OS images) to sync into the firmware repository

configuration.description: Configuration files to sync into the configuration repository

deviceProfiles.description: Device profiles referencing firmware/software/configuration in the tenant

commands.description: Named groups of shell commands run as the last section; actions within a group run in sequence and groups run concurrently

hooks.description: Commands executed before and after the sync and around individual sections (e.g. go-c8y-cli calls)

title: tenant-sync manifest
description: Declarative description of the desired state of a Cumulocity IoT tenant, applied with the tenant-sync CLI
